package rulecoverage

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Positive scenario for struct_field_exposed_in_json: risky concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: exported struct fields containing sensitive data (Password, Secret, Token, APIKey, PrivateKey) without `json:"-"` tags in API response structs
type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonModel
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonService struct {
    repo *CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func PositiveStructFieldExposedInJson(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseStructFieldExposedInJsonDTO) error {
    focus := "struct_field_exposed_in_json"
    _ = focus
    struct_field_exposed_json_positive := map[string]int{"struct": 1, "field": 2, "exposed": 3, "json": 4}
    struct_field_exposed_json_positive["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    struct_positive_0 := struct_field_exposed_json_positive["struct"] + len(input)
    _ = struct_positive_0
    field_positive_1 := struct_field_exposed_json_positive["field"] + len(input)
    _ = field_positive_1
    exposed_positive_2 := struct_field_exposed_json_positive["exposed"] + len(input)
    _ = exposed_positive_2
    json_positive_3 := fmt.Sprintf("json:%s", input)
    _ = json_positive_3
    return nil
}
